login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue creating and syncing projects
login.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again
login.profileSyncLater: Signed in, profile will sync later
login.profileLoadFail: Signed in, but failed to load profile
login.profileLoadFailWithErr: Signed in, but failed to load profile: {{msg}}
login.marketingDesc: Sign in to restore chapters, sessions, and world memory, continuing from where you left off.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Fill in basic info and verify your email
register.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
register.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.codeSentSuccess: Verification code sent to your email
register.marketingHeadline: Start your serial project for free
register.marketingDesc: Register to experience transparent orchestration, world memory, and streaming drafts. Free tier includes monthly AI quota.
register.hasAccountGoLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
register.regClosedDesc: Platform is under maintenance, no new users accepted. Contact admin if you have questions.
register.emailCodeHint: Code sent, please check your email (including spam)
register.stepAccountDesc: Pick a username and enter your email
register.stepVerifyDesc: We sent a code to your inbox
register.stepSecurityDesc: Choose a secure password for your account

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: Receive a reset link via registered email
forgot.success: If registered, you will receive a reset email
forgot.marketingDesc: We will send a one-time reset link to your registered email, valid for 1 hour.
forgot.sentDesc2: is registered, please check your email (including spam) and click the link to set a new password.

reset.title: Set New Password
reset.subtitle: Please enter your new password
reset.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
reset.success: Password updated, please sign in with your new password
reset.marketingDesc: After setting a new password, please use it to sign in to the dashboard.
reset.invalidLink1: Reset link is invalid or expired, please

verify.subtitleFail: Please request a new verification email
verify.msgInvalid: Verification link is invalid or expired, please request a new verification email.
verify.msgSuccess: Email verified successfully, you can now use all features.
verify.msgFail: Email verification failed, please try again later.
verify.marketingDesc: Verify your email to use all creative features and receive account and security notifications.

legal.leadRegister: By registering, you have read and agree to
legal.leadLogin: By signing in, you understand and agree to
legal.leadCaptcha: Captcha is used to protect account and email channels.
legal.leadNeutral: By continuing, you understand and agree to
legal.registerDesc: We will send a one-time code to your email; passwords are encrypted and never stored in plain text.
legal.loginDesc: Session credentials are encrypted; abnormal logins can be recovered via email verification.
legal.captchaDesc: Puzzle backgrounds are generated in real-time by the server to prevent bots. They are not user uploads and will not be used for model training or public display.
